pageContext.name: Megatron
pageContext.description: I will win by any means! At any cost!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Megatron Fine Art Print by artist Orlando Arocena.  The Decepticons are rising up, led by the tyrannical Megatron! This portrait of an iconic villain looks cold and calculating, expertly rendered in Orlando Arocena's signature vector art style with detailed screentone effects and flares highlighting the mechanical silhouette. A black and blue grid background inspired by classic Transformers imagery frames the fan-favorite character, representing the harsher side of Cybertron. A ruthless tactician seeking to overcome his enemy Optimus Prime, the sinister silver Decepticon will stop at nothing to dominate every world he encounters.  Each Megatron Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces, making this Transformers wall art a must-have for fans. Pair this portrait with the Optimus Prime Fine Art Print by Orlando Arocena for the ultimate showdown between the Autobots and Decepticons in your collection.  Conquer your collection with the Megatron Fine Art Print by Orlando Arocena today!
